rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers both how heat pumps work and why a homeowner might choose one. It uses helpful comparisons, concrete details like 2-4 units of heat and 95-98% furnace efficiency, and a logical progression from concept to tradeoffs. Slightly longer and a bit more polished/marketing-like than strictly necessary, but still accessible and effective.
